basin.name: Dharma-Yukta
basin.description: A life aligned with cosmic order. Strong moral compass, truthful conduct, and justice-seeking nature.
basin.escape_trigger: When AHANKAR (ego) overwhelms DHARMA through unchecked power or praise.
basin.warning: Risk of rigidity — dharma without compassion becomes tyranny.

normal_astrology: Sun in Leo (Own Sign): Core identity is shaped by Leo energy — leadership and authority.
Moon in Scorpio (Debilitated): Emotional world is intense and secretive.
Venus Mahadasha (strength 0.35): Mixed results — planet has moderate influence. Focus on Venus-ruled matters.
Strongest placement: Saturn in Libra (Exalted, 0.95). Weakest: Moon in Scorpio (Debilitated, 0.20).
iogita_insight: io-gita attractor analysis places you in the Dharma-Yukta (धर्म-युक्त) basin. Your dominant atoms are ATMA (1.000), DHARMA (0.950), NYAYA (0.773), with KAAM (-0.971) as the strongest suppressed force. Under Venus Mahadasha, the Dharma-Yukta pattern is reinforced — expect deepening of this life theme. Normal astrology sees planets in signs. io-gita sees the COMBINED gravitational field — where all 9 planets pull your consciousness toward Dharma-Yukta. Estimated trajectory: 74 computational steps in this basin. Risk of rigidity — dharma without compassion becomes tyranny.
